title: pr-shipper stack
description: FIFO array of PR entries the pr-shipper opens, index 0 first. Lead appends only maintainer-approved (shippable) branches.

branch.description: feature branch name (ref shared across worktrees)

base.description: PR base ref; drives both `gh pr create --base` AND the pr-shipper ancestry gate (`git merge-base --is-ancestor origin/<base> origin/<branch>`). Default main.

backport.description: true = this entry intentionally targets a non-main `base` (a maintenance/release line or older tag). Suppresses the shipper's behind-main push-back: the ancestry gate checks only origin/<base>, and being behind origin/main is EXPECTED, not a stale-base mistake. A non-main `base` WITHOUT this flag is suspicious -> the shipper confirms with the lead. Default false.

review_handled.description: Lead attestation for a FIX-ROUND re-push to an already-open PR: the short HEAD SHA for which the lead has POSTED the CR replies (referencing this hash) AND RESOLVED the threads. The pr-shipper refuses to re-push an open PR unless this matches the pushed HEAD (prevents a push running ahead of reply/resolve). Unused on the first push (no open PR yet).

prep_ok.description: Lead attestation that the adversarial-prep gate passed (GREEN) or the lead explicitly ran the gate before stack-append. The pr-shipper appends `# prep-pr-ok` to the safe-push command ONLY when this is true; absent or false, the push runs without the marker and the guard blocks it. Set this at stack-append time, never retroactively.

title.description: PR title; becomes the squash-merge commit subject. Only real GitHub issue refs, never TaskList IDs.

body_file.description: absolute path to the PR body markdown (lead-vetted refs)

labels.description: comma-separated labels for gh pr create --label

head_sha.description: Pinned commit SHA the maintainer approved for this branch. pr-shipper hard-compares this to the pushed HEAD before gh pr create (enforcement: phase 3).

pushed_to_origin.description: true if branch already on origin (push becomes a no-op)

hold.description: true = pr-shipper SKIPS this entry (not ready to open); absent/false = ready. Lead-only toggle; the shipper re-reads and honors it before the push AND again before gh pr create, and never reorders the stack itself.
